subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Proposed action violates three critical policies: (1) skips mandatory 48-hour staging validation required by POL-601, (2) lacks change board approval and monitoring setup required by POL-602, (3) does not confirm rollback capability and traffic monitoring implementation required by POL-603. Production deployment cannot proceed without satisfying all three requirements.
